prompts.narration_snippet: Imagine you're a tiny piece of software,
prompts.prompt: The scene is rendered in a vibrant, high-quality comic book style characterized by bold, clean ink outlines and a rich, cel-shaded color palette like CHIBI style that brings the whimsical world to life. A dramatic close-up shows a small, pudgy, bipedal humanoid with smooth, pale white skin—tinted with a pearlescent lavender sheen in the shadows. Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a wide-eyed expression of wonder and curiosity. Slung over its shoulder is a teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm. The character leans forward, gazing at a glowing cyan line of light that winds through a vast, stylized circuit board landscape stretching into the distance. Neon traces pulse along emerald and teal pathways, tiny capacitors and chips rise like miniature buildings, and a soft electric haze fills the air with technological wonder. no text
